sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17081" key="a)timasto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀτῑμ-αστός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n17081.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dishonoured,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">γυναιξίν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0255.tlg001:1:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Mimn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.9</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
